name: JoAi: List User Teams

description.en: Retrieve the teams a user belongs to. Use this to get the personal team slug needed for generating an upgrade link.
description.es: Retrieve the teams a user belongs to. Use this to get the personal team slug needed for generating an upgrade link.
description.fr: Retrieve the teams a user belongs to. Use this to get the personal team slug needed for generating an upgrade link.
description.ro: Retrieve the teams a user belongs to. Use this to get the personal team slug needed for generating an upgrade link.
description.it: Retrieve the teams a user belongs to. Use this to get the personal team slug needed for generating an upgrade link.

bot: Use this after user-create to get the user's personal team slug. Pass the userId from user-create output. The personal team is marked with personal: true.

inputs.name: User ID

description.en: The id of the user (from user-create output)
description.es: The id of the user (from user-create output)
description.fr: The id of the user (from user-create output)
description.ro: The id of the user (from user-create output)
description.it: The id of the user (from user-create output)

inputs.bot: The user's id returned by the user-create warp.
